name: IHG One Rewards Premier Credit Card
perks: Free anniversary night (up to 40,000 points) every year
Fourth Reward Night Free when redeeming points for consecutive stays
10x points at IHG Hotels and Resorts
5x on dining, gas, and travel purchases
Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application fee credit
140,000 bonus points after spending $3,000 in first 3 months
drawbacks: IHG points worth only ~0.6 cents each (lower value than Hyatt or Marriott)
IHG has inconsistent quality across brands
Annual night certificate capped at 40,000 points
